creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Bryan Drewery (bdrewery@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> FYI the patch has conflicts and missing files now:
> 
> C         audio/gogglesmm/Makefile
> C         audio/gogglesmm/pkg-plist
> Skipped missing target: 'games/phlipple/pkg-plist'
> Skipped missing target: 'games/pipewalker/pkg-plist'
> C         graphics/mandelbulber/Makefile
> C         graphics/structuresynth/Makefile

Well this is expected for such a large patch. Actually, I've already
updated it twice with conflicts resolved.

Except for gogglessmm these are my ports which I've prepared for
staging with obvious plist changes. I'll deal with them after and
will double-check gogglesmm.

> I am applying the changes manually and running the full build still.

Thanks!
